channel.title: untagged on Pedro Junqueira
channel.description: Recent content in untagged on Pedro Junqueira

item.title: Openshift
item.description: Important Openshift command lines minishift oc-env export PATH="/Users/pedrojunqueira/.minishift/cache/oc/v3.11.0/darwin:$PATH" to log in oc login -u <user> -p <password> deploy an application from git oc new-app https://github.com/sclorg/nodejs-ex -l name=myapp log in as sys:admin oc login -u system:admin get users oc get users make an user called administrator a system admin oc adm policy add-cluster-role-to-user cluster-admin administrator now the administrator user is adm and see all the projects
